description: Currency Decimal Precision Check
Country Code Compliance (ISO 3166-1 Alpha-2)
Charge Bearer Code Validation
Postal Address Coexistence Rule: If Address Line is absent, Town Name and Country must be present.
Instruction ID is unusually long
BIC Existence in SWIFT Directory
Urgent payments should normally be settled on the current date.
expression: not (exists('SvcLvl.Cd') and 'URGT' in str(DATA.get('SvcLvl.Cd'))) or DATA.get('IntrBkSttlmDt') == datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')

description: Conditional Amount Limit based on Purpose Code
IBAN Based Currency Validation
LEI cannot replace BIC for financial institution agents. CBPR+ requires BICFI.
expression: exists(KEY.rsplit('.LEI', 1)[0] + '.BICFI') if '.' in KEY else True

description: IntrmyAgt2 cannot exist without IntrmyAgt1.
expression: not any(k.endswith('IntrmyAgt2.FinInstnId.BICFI') for k in DATA.keys()) or any(k.endswith('IntrmyAgt1.FinInstnId.BICFI') for k in DATA.keys())

description: IntrmyAgt3 cannot exist without IntrmyAgt2.
expression: not any(k.endswith('IntrmyAgt3.FinInstnId.BICFI') for k in DATA.keys()) or any(k.endswith('IntrmyAgt2.FinInstnId.BICFI') for k in DATA.keys())

description: ISO Purpose Code Validation (SR2025)
ISO Category Purpose Code Validation (SR2025)
If Settlement Method is CLRG (Clearing System), Clearing System (ClrSys) identity must be present.
condition: any(k.endswith('.GrpHdr.SttlmInf.SttlmMtd') and DATA[k] == 'CLRG' for k in DATA.keys())
expression: any(k.endswith('.GrpHdr.SttlmInf.ClrSys') for k in DATA.keys()) or any(k.endswith('.CdtTrfTxInf.SttlmInf.ClrSys') for k in DATA.keys())

description: Party Identification: Organization ID (/OrgId) and Private ID (/PrvtId) are mutually exclusive. Both cannot be present.
Financial Institution Identification: Must contain either a BICFI or a Clearing System Member identification.
Party Identification: When an ID (Organisation /OrgId or Private /PrvtId) is provided, the Name field (/Nm) should also be included for reference.
Validation of scheme code for Organisation Identification. Allowed: LEI, DUNS, VAT, TXID, GIIN, CRN.
errorMessage: Validation of scheme code for Organisation Identification. Allowed: LEI, DUNS, VAT, TXID, GIIN, CRN.
fix: Use a valid Organisation scheme code like 'LEI' or 'DUNS'.

description: Validation of scheme code for Private Identification. Allowed: CCPT, DRLC, NIDN, SSSN, PASSPORT, NATIONALID.
errorMessage: Validation of scheme code for Private Identification. Allowed: CCPT, DRLC, NIDN, SSSN, PASSPORT, NATIONALID.
fix: Use a valid Private scheme code like 'CCPT' (Passport) or 'NIDN'.

description: Settlement Method must be one of the ISO 20022 standard codes: INDA, INGA, CLRG, COVE
Organisation identification cannot accompany personal name and vice versa (ENTITY_MISMATCH).
errorMessage: ENTITY_MISMATCH: Organisation identification (OrgId) found with a non-corporate name. A corporate keyword (e.g., LTD, INC) is expected.
fix: Ensure the <Nm> tag includes a corporate indicator like 'Ltd', 'Corp', or 'Inc', or use <PrvtId> if this is an individual.
expression: not exists(KEY + '.Nm') or any(kw in str(DATA.get(KEY + '.Nm', '')).upper() for kw in ['LTD', 'LIMITED', 'PVT', 'PRIVATE', 'INC', 'CORP', 'BANK', 'PLC', 'COMPANY', 'GROUP', 'HOLDINGS'])

description: Organisation identification cannot accompany personal name and vice versa (ENTITY_MISMATCH).
errorMessage: ENTITY_MISMATCH: Private identification (PrvtId) found with a corporate name keyword.
fix: Remove corporate keywords (e.g., 'Ltd', 'Corp') from the <Nm> field, or use <OrgId> if this is a company identification.
expression: not exists(KEY + '.Nm') or not any(kw in str(DATA.get(KEY + '.Nm', '')).upper() for kw in ['LTD', 'LIMITED', 'PVT', 'PRIVATE', 'INC', 'CORP', 'BANK', 'PLC', 'COMPANY', 'GROUP', 'HOLDINGS'])

description: Debtor and Creditor are mandatory for all payment messages. For customer credit transfers (pacs.008, pacs.003), Debtor Agent and Creditor Agent are also required.
condition: any((k.startswith('Document.FIToFI') and 'FIToFIPmtStsRpt' not in k and 'FIToFIPmtCxlReq' not in k) or k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf') or k.startswith('Document.CstmrCdtTrfInitn') or k.startswith('Document.PmtIndctn') for k in DATA.keys())
expression: any('.Dbtr' in k for k in DATA.keys()) and any('.Cdtr' in k for k in DATA.keys()) and (any(k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf') for k in DATA.keys()) or (any('.DbtrAgt' in k for k in DATA.keys()) and any('.CdtrAgt' in k for k in DATA.keys())))
errorMessage: Mandatory Parties Missing: Debtor and Creditor must be provided. For customer credit transfers, Debtor Agent and Creditor Agent must also be included.
fix: Ensure <Dbtr> and <Cdtr> blocks are included. For pacs.008/pacs.003, also include <DbtrAgt> and <CdtrAgt>.

description: AppHdr Priority Validation (HIGH, NORM, LOW)
Service Level Code (SvcLvl/Cd) must be a valid ExternalServiceLevel1Code.
Local Instrument Code (LclInstrm/Cd) must be a valid ExternalLocalInstrument1Code.
Clearing System Identification Code (ClrSys/Cd or ClrSysId/Cd) must be a valid ExternalCashClearingSystem1Code.
Cash Account Type Code (Acct/Tp/Cd) must be a valid ExternalCashAccountType1Code.
Entry Status Code (Sts/Cd) must be a valid ExternalEntryStatus1Code.
BIC must be exactly 8 or 11 characters (XSD pattern allows it; this gives a clearer error).
errorMessage: BIC must be exactly 8 or 11 characters.
fix: A valid BIC is 8 chars (e.g. NDEAFIHH) or 11 chars including a 3-char branch (e.g. NDEAFIHHXXX).

description: LEI must be exactly 20 alphanumeric characters (ISO 17442).
JPY amounts cannot have decimal places.
errorMessage: JPY (Japanese Yen) does not support decimal places.
fix: Remove the decimal portion from the JPY amount (e.g. use '1000' instead of '1000.00').

description: IBAN must contain only uppercase A-Z and digits 0-9.
errorMessage: IBAN must use only uppercase letters and digits with no spaces.
fix: Remove any lowercase letters or whitespace from the IBAN value.

description: Party Name (Nm) should not be a BIC code — likely a mapping error.
expression: not (len(str(VALUE).strip()) in (8, 11) and __import__('re').match(r'^[A-Z]{4}[A-Z]{2}[A-Z0-9]{2}([A-Z0-9]{3})?$', str(VALUE).strip()) is not None)
errorMessage: Party <Nm> looks like a BIC code rather than a name — verify the mapping.
fix: Move the BIC value into <BICFI> and put the actual party name in <Nm>.

description: Settlement / execution dates more than 1 year in the future are unusual.
errorMessage: Settlement / execution date is more than 1 year in the future.
fix: Verify the date is correct. Future-dated payments beyond 12 months are unusual and may be rejected by clearing systems.

description: When IntrmyAgt1 is present, CdtrAgt must also be present. CBPR+ dependency rule: an intermediary agent requires a creditor agent to define the end of the payment chain.
condition: any(re.search(r'\.IntrmyAgt1[\[.]', k) for k in DATA.keys())
expression: any(re.search(r'\.CdtrAgt[\[.]', k) for k in DATA.keys())
errorMessage: IntrmyAgt1 (Intermediary Agent 1) is present but CdtrAgt (Creditor Agent) is missing. Per CBPR+ rules, a Creditor Agent must be present whenever an Intermediary Agent is specified.
fix: Add <CdtrAgt><FinInstnId><BICFI>CREDITOR_BIC</BICFI></FinInstnId></CdtrAgt> to the transaction, or remove <IntrmyAgt1> if no intermediary routing is required.
